description: Page Four Thesis of the Centra Executive Committee of the Communist Party of the US k on the War Danger and the Tasks of the Communist Party PART L 1 With the provocation of war by the Chinese hirelings of world im perialism the war danger takes on a concrete form This was clearly fore seen by the Communist International when it called upon the workers of the world to organize for the strug gle against the danger of war Al ready in the thesis of the Sixth World Congress on the international situation it was pointed out that the third period in which the con tradiction between the growth of the productive forces and the contraction of markets become particularly ac centuated is inevitably giving rise to a fresh series of imperialist wars among the imperialist states these vars of the imperialist states against the USSR wars of national libera tion against imperialism and im perialistic federation and to gigantic class battles Further in the theses of the Sixth World Congress on the War Danger it was stated that the antagonisms between the imperialist powers in the struggle for markets are more and more sharply ex pressed But still
